description: Curator verdicts for catalog entry descriptions. RTL-P2.399. Scanner honours verdict=good entries by emitting locked_text verbatim, skipping every tier. See routertl/docs/internal/ or RTL-P2.399 backlog for the full design.

analog-devices/ad_tdd_control.locked_text: Time-division duplex controller generating synchronized transmit and receive path switching signals based on frame timing.
analog-devices/ad_tdd_control.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

analog-devices/axi_dmac_reset_manager.locked_text: Cross-domain reset and enable manager for AXI DMA controller request, destination, and source clock domains.
analog-devices/axi_dmac_reset_manager.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

analog-devices/hsci_master_regs_regs.locked_text: Register bank for the HSCI master controller, exposing configuration and status fields over the processor interface.
analog-devices/hsci_master_regs_regs.notes: upstream description was an ASCII register-map dump; rewrote from module role.

analog-devices/hsci_mlink_ctrl.locked_text: High-speed serial link controller coordinating FSM-based link establishment with clock adjustment and alignment.
analog-devices/hsci_mlink_ctrl.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

analog-devices/up_delay_cntrl.locked_text: Configurable delay controller with register-based processor interface for multiple delay channels and DRP readback.
analog-devices/up_delay_cntrl.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.
